title: Vibrant Saudi Lamb Skewers
description: Fresh lamb skewers marinated with coriander, dates, and caramelized onions, grilled to perfection for a romantic date-night Saudi Arabian experience.
instructions: In a bowl, combine coriander, cumin, paprika, salt, pepper, olive oil, and lemon juice to make a smooth paste.
Add lamb cubes to the paste, toss to coat evenly, cover, and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
While lamb marinates, layer onion slices, then dates on a separate plate to caramelize slightly.
Preheat a robata grill to medium-high heat and oil the grates lightly.
Thread marinated lamb onto skewers alternating with onion and date pieces.
Place skewers on the grill and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, basting with remaining paste, until lamb is browned and juices run clear.
During the last minute of grilling, drizzle caramelized onion and date mix over the lamb.
Remove from grill, let rest for 5 minutes, then serve with fresh coriander garnish and a squeeze of lemon.
